title: Ace’s Fate and the End of the War: Key Exchange

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ACE'S FAMILY IS OUR FAMILY TOO!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: You won't take the Strawhat boy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And Blackbeard doesn't look any different...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me show you my power,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
